zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg於1266年4月14日出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇梅可倫波格時，他的父親Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg36歲，母親Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita27歲。他於1292年8月11日與Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard在德國福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-斯特雷利次布藍登波格結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1302年被列為regent of mecklenburg。他去世於1329年1月21日在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 梅可倫波-史維林享年62歲，埋葬在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg于1266年4月14日出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇梅可倫波格时，他的父亲Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg36岁，母亲Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita27岁。他于1292年8月11日与Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard在德国福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-斯特雷利次布藍登波格结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1302年被列为regent of mecklenburg。他去世于1329年1月21日在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 梅可倫波-史維林享年62岁，埋葬在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mecklenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the province of this name in northern Germany, so called from Old Saxon mikil ‘big, great’ + burg ‘castle’. Amongst Jews this may have been acquired alternatively as an artificial name.

variants.name: Mekelburg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Helmut.
German: variant of Meckelburg, itself a variant of Mecklenburg .

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: "der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Löwe"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much reduced form of   Eleanore .  Occasionally, a variant of   Lora .

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg was born on 14 April 1266, in Mecklenburg, Holy Roman Empire, his father, Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg, was 36 and his mother, Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita, was 27. He married Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard on 11 August 1292, in Neubrandenburg, Mecklenburg-Strelitz, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1302, his occupation is listed as regent of mecklenburg. He died on 21 January 1329, in Mecklenburg-Schwerin, at the age of 62, and was buried in Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg est né le 14 avril 1266, à Mecklenburg, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard le 11 août 1292, à Neubrandenburg, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Strelitz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1302, sa profession de son indiquée est regent of mecklenburg. Il est décédé le 21 janvier 1329, à Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg am 14. April 1266 in Mecklenburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg 36 und seine Mutter Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita 27. Er hat am 11. August 1292 in Neubrandenburg, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Strelitz, Deutschland Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1302 ist sein Beruf als regent of mecklenburg aufgeführt. Er starb am 21. Januar 1329 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin und wurde in Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg è nato il il 14 aprile 1266 nel Mecklenburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard il 11 agosto 1292, nel Neubrandenburg, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Strelitz, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1302, la sua occupazione è indicata come regent of mecklenburg. Morì il 21 gennaio 1329, nel Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburgが1266年4月14日にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチメックレンブルグで生まれた時，父Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburgは36歳，母Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfitaは27歳であった。1292年8月11日にドイツフレイスタアト メックレンブルグ-ストレリッツネウブランデンブルグでBeatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1302年，職業はregent of mecklenburgと記録されている。彼は1329年1月21日にグロssハーゾグトゥム メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンで62歳で死去し，ドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Schweriner Horst, Schwerin, Teltow, Bran: 독일 플레우ss 플로빈츠 브랜덴버그 크레이스 텔타우 슈워인 슈워이너 호르스트
ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg(이)가 1266년 4월 14일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 클렌버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1292년 8월 11일 독일 프레이스타앳 클렌버그-스트렐리츠 니우브랜덴버그에서 Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1302년, 그의 직업은 regent of mecklenburg이었다. 그는 1329년 1월 21일 그로ss헤어즈그투 클렌버그-슈워인에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg nasceu em 14 de abril de 1266, em Mecklenburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard em 11 de agosto de 1292, em Neubrandenburg, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Strelitz, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1302, sua profissão aparece como regent of mecklenburg. Ele faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1329, em Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha.

ru.Schweriner Horst, Schwerin, Teltow, Bran: щвираинир хаурст, щвирин, крис телтоу, провинз брэнденбург, Пруссия, Германия
ru.Bad Doberan, Rostock, Mecklenburg, Weste: крис бад добиран, ростокк, Восточная Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg родился 14 апреля 1266 г. в местности меккленбург, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard 11 августа 1292 г. в местности неубрэнденбург, фристаат меккленбург-стрелиц, Германия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1302 году он работал по профессии regent of mecklenburg. Он умер 21 января 1329 г. в местности гроssхирзогтум меккленбург-щвирин в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich II "der Löwe" von Mecklenburg nació el 14 de abril de 1266, en Mecklenburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Heinrich I "der Pilger" von Mecklenburg, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Anastazja Barnimówna Gryfita, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Beatrix de Brandenburg-Mecklenburg Heiress of Stargard el 11 de agosto de 1292, en Neubrandenburg, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Strelitz, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1302, su ocupación registrada era regent of mecklenburg. Murió el 21 de enero de 1329, en Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania.
